next_steps: Obtain serum TSH, free T4, and total T3 to evaluate for thyrotoxicosis
Perform thyroid ultrasound with color Doppler flow to assess vascularity and inflammation
Order thyroid peroxidase (TPO) antibodies and TSH-receptor antibodies
Measure erythrocyte sedimentation rate (ESR) and C-reactive protein (CRP) to track inflammatory status
Obtain infectious disease serologies including Bartonella henselae and Toxoplasma gondii
Consider thyroid radioactive iodine uptake and scan to differentiate subacute thyroiditis from hyperthyroid states
Schedule follow-up to assess response to non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs (NSAIDs) or corticosteroids if subacute thyroiditis is confirmed
